case_title: LAI PING LEE VS. ELISABETH GREEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-14-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LEE, LAI PING AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, ELISABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, LAI PING AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, ELISABETH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2010 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, LAI PING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN, ELISABETH $2,690.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,835.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, ELISABETH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-14-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA C. HO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. VIVIAN CHOY INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
